name: Sun Domain Spells
description:
Sun Domain always-prepared domain spell source list:
Tier 1: Guiding Bolt, Shield of Faith, Continual Flame, Moonbeam
Tier 2: Daylight, Blinding Smite
Tier 3: Sickening Radiance, Divination
Tier 4: Dawn, Wall of Light
